arts.ttl: Man City frontrunners to sign Nottingham Forest star Morgan Gibbs-White ahead of rivals, while another star is their 'dream' recruit as club plot summer rebuild
arts.sum: Manchester City are considered frontrunners in the pursuit of England international Morgan Gibbs-White this summer.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Man City's summer plans revealed as Doku and Silva face the axe
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Man City's summer plans revealed as Doku and Silva face the axe FootballTransfers understands that Manchester City are planning a major summer clearout, with several high-profile players potentially on the chopping block.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Open: Carlos Alcaraz beats Alex de Minaur to book semi-final place at ATP Tour 500 event
arts.sum: A two-time winner of the ATP Tour 500 event in 2022 and 2023, Spaniard Alcaraz will face 20-year-old Frenchman Arthur Fils for a place in the final, after Greece's Stefanos Tsitsipas was forced to retire from their semi-final later on Friday at 2-0 down in the first set. Carlos Alcaraz is through to the semi-finals of the Barcelona Open after defeating Australia's Alex de Minaur in straight sets 7-5 6-3.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Neymar BACK to Barcelona, De Bruyne NEGOTIATIONS, Ancelotti SACK
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Neymar BACK to Barcelona, De Bruyne NEGOTIATIONS, Ancelotti SACK Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including the latest on Neymar, Kevin de Bruyne and Carlo Ancelotti.

arts.ttl: Man City FA Youth Cup final date confirmed as Blues look to make history
arts.sum: Manchester City booked their place in the FA Youth Cup final with a win at Watford last week, looking to defend last year's title.

arts.ttl: Phil Foden set to return to the pitch for the first time since being hit by vile chants about his mum - as Pep Guardiola makes selection call
arts.sum: The 24-year-old was forced onto the sidelines after suffering an injury in City's Manchester derby clash at Old Trafford earlier this month.

CITY+ is available via an annual subscription of £34.99 a year, saving you £24 on our monthly offering. Kovacic starts with a look back at his arrival in the summer of 2023 and what it was like joining a City team that had just landed the Treble.

arts.ttl: Guardiola: Watching brief offering extra motivation for Champions League qualification
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola says watching the latter stages of the Champions League has given him extra motivation to lead City to qualification for next season’s competition. The manager spoke of how much he enjoyed the Aston Villa v Paris Saint-Germain and Borussia Dortmund v Barcelona quarter-final games this past midweek.

arts.ttl: Goodison Park is special, says Guardiola
arts.sum: However, the Catalan did use Friday’s press conference to praise the storied arena and look ahead to next year’s visit to the new stadium at Bramley-Moore Dock. Our official Man City app allows you to follow all of the action from the match in one place.

arts.ttl: Everton manager banned me from dressing room after 45 minutes - I didn't deserve it
arts.sum: Former Everton striker Oumar Niasse celebrates his 35th birthday today
